content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1598: Divine weapon!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

Desolate was moving in the void in Ghost Hunter’s form. He didn’t need to group like the others as he had clear directions!

In the Absolute Beginning Era, many creatures knew that Desolate had two marvelous divine weapons, one of which was the Life Soul Tree that could create lives and new species. It had the power of the Creator with which Desolate could use his God power to create new and different races.

The Heavenly Monster Tribe, Immortal Demon Clan, God clan, Imperial Dark Tribe, Giant Clan, Dark Spirit Clan, and the other races that existed in Desolate Territory were created by his soul power. The Life Soul Tree was the most-desired secret treasure for the experts with Life Power Upanishad. Of course, Desolate had mastered the Life Power Upanishad.

Except for the Life Soul Tree, he had another divine weapon called the Power Upanishad Original Seal.

That Power Upanishad Original Seal was the place Shi Yan’s and Audrey’s souls had visited when they had fused with the heaven flames. It was also a wonderful land inside Desolate Territory where magical Power Upanishads were stored that the warriors could use their souls to learn.

The Power Upanishad Original Seal had many power Upanishads, from the five elements to gravity, space, life, stars, etc. Except for the Devouring power Upanishad and the eight evil powers, the Power Upanishad Original Seal had the marks of all Power Upanishads!

No one knew how Desolate got those two Absolute Beginning divine weapons or how to refine them. No matter what, their power had shaken the entire Absolute Beginning Era!

Today, Desolate recognized that his Power Upanishad Original Seal had a special connection with this space. His Power Upanishad Original Seal seemed to be the map of this strange world. It emitted magical energy fluctuations which had the same frequencies as different Power Upanishad Origins in this world!

Using the Power Upanishad Original Seal, he could navigate the power Upanishads that the Power Upanishad Original Seal had.

While the others were wandering around blindly, he had the right directions, and he could choose which Power Upanishad Origin he wanted to fuse with.

He found a Power Upanishad Origin nearest to him that he wanted to take: it was the Metal Power Upanishad Origin.

In this vast sea of stars, most of the creatures decided to cultivate only one Power Upanishad. Not many people had the same cultivating path like Shi Yan, who cultivated many Power Upanishads at the same time.

Desolate belonged to this group; as a matter of fact, he had cultivated even more Power Upanishads than Shi Yan!

His major power Upanishads included the Five Elements – Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, and Earth—Life, and Light. Although he had cultivated many Power Upanishads at the same time, he had reached the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, which showed his innate talent and competence.

This was the reason why Desolate was titled the God of War during Absolute Beginning Era. Compared to the experts at the same realm, Desolate had more Power Upanishads, and had the upper hand in fighting. It wasn’t anything mysterious.

He had exerted his efforts hundreds or thousands of times more than the others to reach the Peak of Territory Ancestor Realm. Naturally, he was much stronger than the ones cultivating only one Power Upanishad!

Desolate got the correct direction, which had facilitated him much better than the Original Symbol Shi Yan had gifted Mei Ji, Emperor Sea Shark, and Montecie. The others could only feel the Power Upanishad Origin when they arrived in a certain range, but Desolate didn’t need to do that...

No matter where he was, he could find the right Power Upanishad Origin he wanted. He could even see the distance between him and the Power Upanishad Origin.

First, he came to the Metal Power Upanishad Origin.

Hiro had come to this place earlier than him, and he was fusing with the Power Upanishad Origin, which was the gold mountain!

After Hiro got into the gold mountain, it had become a gold giant hovering in the void. The terrifying, immense aura from the giant shot in the void.

“Someone got here earlier than me...” When Desolate saw the gold giant, he was surprised. Watching for a while, he said indifferently, “Too bad you’ve not finished yet and it has just started. So, you can only blame your poor destiny...”

Desolate watched the mountain that was holding Hiro, screaming all of a sudden. His body swelled up, transforming into his Absolute Beginning body, which was a brutal giant dragon!

As his body was transforming, he urged the Metal power Upanishad. The gold light shrouded him, making him look as if he was molded out of gold. The scales, horns, and claws on his body all turned gold; Desolate had become a gold dragon that was billions of miles long, and the pure Metal Power Upanishad filled him.

Although he had cultivated a lot of Power Upanishads, he didn’t need to make clones to fuse with a Power Upanishad Origin like Shi Yan had done. He used the giant body of the gold dragon coiling around the gold giant – the giant in Hiro’s shape!

BOOM!

An unimaginably colossal dragon squeezed around a gold giant. Desolate’s terrifying body twisted, and gold light waves rippled from the gold giant, which were the flustered, pure soul energy from Hiro!

A dazzling gold halo emerged above the giant’s head, which was Hiro’s soul. At this moment, the gold halo was swaying hard as if it could burst off at any minute.

“You don’t deserve the Metal Power Upanishad Origin,” Desolate sneered coldly.

Sizzle! Sizzle! Sizzle!

Golden electric beams shot out from every part of the gold giant and congregated into Hiro’s real body.

Hiro was taking in the Metal Power Upanishad Origin, but he was forcefully expelled from the Power Upanishad Origin!

At this moment, Hiro’s crystal bone body emitted a bright golden light, which made him look like a gold skeleton. His eyes rolled as he asked coldly, “Who are you?”

“You should know about me,” Desolate said indifferently.

All of a sudden, a wave of horrible soul attack swarmed toward Hiro like a storm. A familiar feeling churned in his heart as Hiro discolored in fright. He couldn’t help but shout, “Desolate! You are Desolate, the God of War!”

Hiro had joined the defending battle in Cloud Mist Territory where Desolate had attacked them. This frightening pressure that could suffocate people was familiar to him, and he would never forget it!

“Your fortune isn’t really good that you met me before you finished taking in the Power Upanishad Origin. It’s your bad luck!” Desolate said the truth. “If you had gotten it, it wouldn’t be easy to kill you for me. However, it’s effortless to finish you now.”

Then, Desolate roared, his vigorous life energy filling the void and exploding.

A tree grew on Hiro’s gold chest: it was a sapling of the Life Soul Tree. That sapling had been there since Hiro was expelled from the Metal Power Upanishad Origin...

Desolate urged the Life power Upanishad, and the little tree thrived frantically. The small branches pierced through Hiro’s gold skeleton like sharp swords!

Boop! Boop!

Hiro’s gold body shattered just like a gold crystal statue and fell on the ground. He was fragmented terrifyingly.
